loop1.title: Live Operations & Runtime
loop1.note: Showing load factor as a proxy for runtime/service metrics because the UPS meter does not log dedicated run-hours, starts, or transfer counts (FIVE PHYSICAL WALLS). Availability and service intervals are estimated from load factor.

loop1.title: Runtime & Duty
loop1.note: Showing active power as a proxy for run hours and load percentage, as the UPS meter does not log dedicated runtime or start-count fields.
